'''Sundari''' was an arid [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] colonized around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. It was a longtime rival of [[Garos IV]], although it depended on Garos IV for [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]]. It signed a peace treaty with Garos IV [[118 BBY/Legends|118 BBY]], but resumed war [[87 BBY/Legends|87 BBY]].

{{Planet-stub}}
